filters.implementation: load stmt_dict.txt at runtime; find code for empty-string entry (null sentinel); skip rows where stmt_code == null_code; if no null entry found in dict, skip filter entirely

parallelism.merge: sequential loop over 64 thread-local arrays: sum cnt, sum sum_line, set-union distinct_adsh; trivial cost for 16 groups

dictionary_loading.stmt_dict: pre/stmt_dict.txt — load at runtime, find null sentinel code (empty string entry); n_stmt = dict.size() (expected 8)
dictionary_loading.rfile_dict: pre/rfile_dict.txt — load at runtime; n_rfile = dict.size() (expected 2)

notes: C2: load both dicts at runtime, never hardcode codes
C18: decode dict codes to strings for CSV output
P2: zero-copy mmap access via reinterpret_cast<int32_t*>
P14: wrap all mmap+madvise calls in GENDB_PHASE(data_loading)
P5: use GENDB_PHASE for scan_filter, aggregate, merge, output phases
